## Safety

- [ ] I did not include secrets, private source, `.hamiltonian/` state, task packets, receipts, evidence bundles, crash reports, or private URLs.
- [ ] I checked licensing and attribution for third-party material.
- [ ] I did not weaken local-only execution, explicit launch, optional evidence, path containment, or redaction controls.
- [ ] I understand contributions may be used by TWO HANDS NETWORK LTD under separate commercial licenses as described in `CONTRIBUTING.md`.
